sortmod.config.title: SortMod Settings
sortmod.config.showContainerButtons.tip: Turn off if you use ClientSort for container sorting.
sortmod.config.showInventorySortButton.t: The single sort button on the player inventory screen.
sortmod.config.showQuickStackButton.tip: SortMod's signature feature — recommended ON even when paired with other sorters.
sortmod.config.showSearchBox.tip: Turn off if you get search from NEI / REI / JEI.
sortmod.config.layout.tip: Adjust where each SortMod element sits in the container window — useful for avoiding overlap with other mods.
sortmod.layout.title: SortMod Element Layout
sortmod.layout.anchor.tip: Click to cycle the anchor corner. X/Y offsets are measured outward from this corner — negative pushes inward/up.
sortmod.layout.reset.tip: Restore every element to its original position.
